rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission, And Requests For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Friday, September 10, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Marcal Associates, Ltd.¿s motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories, requests for admission and requests for production was continued from September 3 at the parties¿ request to give them more time to engage in meet and confer efforts. The court is not aware if those efforts have been successful in whole or in part. If all issues raised by the motion are not fully resolved before then, by 4pm today the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain and then appear at the hearing at 10am on September 10. = (220/HEK)
